rationale: Observation already has base_record_id entity_community-board-15-brooklyn which resolves to the existing registry record entity_community-board-15-brooklyn. The closest match IS the observation's own base_record_id, so per the rules the decision is new.

The observation's base_record_id is already corridor_nostrand-avenue, which is the correct canonical record for the Nostrand Avenue/Rogers Avenue corridor from Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay (9.3 miles). The observation exactly matches the existing registry record corridor_nostrand-avenue — same streets (Nostrand Ave, Rogers Ave), same limits (Williamsburg Bridge to Sheepshead Bay), same 9.3 mile length served by B44 bus route. The presentation source (201110_nostrand_cb15_slides) is already linked to this registry record via the alias corridor_nostrand-ave-rogers-ave-201110-cb15. Since the observation maps to its own base_record_id with no better match to a different record, the decision is 'new'.
